category_sources: Official Apache Camel K documentation says the kamel CLI is released beside the Camel K operator for running integrations.
source_facts.description identifies kamel as the Apache Camel K CLI.
display_name_sources: Official Apache Camel K CLI documentation uses the command name kamel.
docs_sources: Official Apache Camel K 2.10.x documentation provides the kamel CLI page matching source_facts.version 2.10.1.
Official Apache Camel K installation documentation covers setup for the same project family.
repo_sources: Official Apache Camel K documentation links GitHub releases at github.com/apache/camel-k.
Official apache/camel-k repository describes Apache Camel K, whose CLI executable is kamel.
tags_sources: Official Apache docs describe kamel running Camel K integrations on Kubernetes.
